mnemonics.title: Reversal Algorithm Steps
mnemonics.content: PCRN - Previous, Current, Reverse, Next (the four key steps in reversal algorithm)

mnemonics.title: Cycle Detection
mnemonics.content: Fast & Slow - Fast pointer moves twice as fast as slow pointer for cycle detection

mnemonics.title: Concatenation Process
mnemonics.content: Find End, Attach - To concatenate, find the end of first list and attach second list
